DefaultSync.description: Override for the auto-generated Sync. Same interface as `onDrift` entries (sync name + with).

sync.description: Name of the user-defined Sync resource to use instead of the auto-generated one.

with.description: Template variables passed to the Sync resource for argument interpolation.

description: Spec for `kind: Origin`. References an external project (e.g. dbt) to auto-generate Assets.

autoSync.description: Override `autoSync` for all auto-generated Assets. When `None`, each Asset uses its own default (`true`).

connection.description: Connection resource name for auto-generated Assets.

defaultSync.description: User-defined Sync to override the auto-generated `nagi-dbt-run`.

projectDir.description: Local path to the dbt project directory (relative or absolute).

title: OriginSpec
